display_text: Alchemist Aghanim's Scepter: Grants an allied hero all Aghanim's Scepter upgrades. This is a game-changing support/utility upgrade, allowing Alchemist to accelerate a teammate's power spike and counter late-game scaling issues by instantly unlocking their full Scepter potential.
search_text: Alchemist Aghanim Scepter support utility power spike late-game scaling ally upgrade

display_text: Alchemist Aghanim's Shard: Provides an ally with a basic dispel, attack speed, movement speed, and HP regen. This is a versatile anti-disable and sustain tool, countering slows, silences, and roots while enhancing an ally's survivability and DPS in fights.
search_text: Alchemist Aghanim Shard dispel anti-disable sustain attack speed movement speed HP regen
